name: cross-area-synthesis
goal: Add LLM-powered cross-area synthesis to area memory, identifying connections, dependencies, and convergence signals across areas.

userStories.title: Collect cross-area data and build LLM prompt
userStories.description: Add synthesizeCrossArea() method to AreaMemoryService that reads all area memory files, builds a structured prompt, and calls an LLM. Export LLMCallFn type and buildSynthesisPrompt() helper. Return opaque markdown response.
acceptanceCriteria: synthesizeCrossArea() method exists accepting { callLLM?: LLMCallFn } in options
LLMCallFn type and buildSynthesisPrompt() exported from area-memory.ts
Prompt contains all area names and content, excluding _-prefixed files
Returns null when callLLM not provided or no area files exist
Unit tests cover: prompt content, response passthrough, absent callLLM, _-prefix exclusion
npm run typecheck && npm test pass

userStories.title: Write synthesis output and integrate into refresh flow
userStories.description: Wire synthesizeCrossArea() into refreshAllAreaMemory(), write output to _synthesis.md with YAML frontmatter, extend result type, handle errors gracefully.
acceptanceCriteria: refreshAllAreaMemory() calls synthesizeCrossArea() when callLLM provided and refreshing all areas
Synthesis file written to .arete/memory/areas/_synthesis.md with type/last_refreshed/areas_analyzed frontmatter
RefreshAreaMemoryResult extended with synthesis field
listAreaMemoryStatus() excludes _synthesis.md (verified)
callLLM errors caught as warning, refresh still succeeds
Tests verify integration, file output, error handling
npm run typecheck && npm test pass

userStories.title: CLI output and staleness
userStories.description: Update intelligence.ts and status.ts CLI commands to pass callLLM, display synthesis status, and show staleness.
acceptanceCriteria: CLI checks services.ai.isConfigured() before creating callLLM wrapper
callLLM wrapper uses services.ai.call('synthesis', prompt) pattern
CLI output includes synthesis status line
--json output includes synthesis field
arete status shows synthesis freshness when _synthesis.md exists
Error handling shows failed message
npm run typecheck && npm test pass
